## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Please describe the problem before the solution. Evidence from real implementations is much more compelling than speculation. -->

## Proposal

<!-- What do you think should change? Be specific — schema field, method name, pattern name. -->

## Scope

- [ ] Pattern language (`patterns/`)
- [ ] Wire protocol (`spec/`)
- [ ] Schema (`schemas/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)
- [ ] Example (`examples/`)

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why is this the right option? -->

## Backwards compatibility

<!-- Would this break existing implementations? How would you transition? -->

## Willingness to implement

- [ ] I'm willing to submit a PR if the proposal is accepted
- [ ] I'd like someone else to implement this
- [ ] Unsure
